hero.headline: Tria powers your business with custom software
hero.subtitle: We are a Costa Rica-based software services company. We design, build, and scale digital products with a strong focus on outcomes, speed, and engineering quality.

services.title: Development Services
services.subtitle: Full-stack software engineering for every platform.

process.title: Our Process
process.subtitle: A disciplined agile approach to software development, refined through years of delivering production-grade applications.

1.label: Step 01
1.title: Discovery
1.description: Technical requirements gathering, architecture planning, and technology stack selection.

2.label: Step 02
2.title: Design & Architecture
2.description: System design, database modeling, API specifications, and UI/UX prototyping.

3.label: Step 03
3.title: Development
3.description: Agile implementation with continuous integration, code reviews, and automated testing.

4.label: Step 04
4.title: Deploy & Optimize
4.description: Production deployment, performance optimization, monitoring setup, and documentation.

billing.title: Pricing with realistic rates for Costa Rica
billing.subtitle: Reference plans for product development and support. Includes technical leadership, QA, and weekly execution follow-up.
billing.note: All plans include weekly execution follow-up, technical leadership, and QA. Custom quotes available for specific requirements.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Best for small businesses that need to evolve their product with an agile team.

plans.name: Growth
plans.description: For growing companies that need consistent delivery and faster feature velocity.
features: Team of 2 devs + QA + tech lead

plans.name: Scale
plans.description: For critical products that must scale with robust architecture and operations.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.subtitle: Within 24 hours, we share a technical recommendation, timeline estimate, and investment range.
contact.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. We will get back to you within 24 hours.

form.name: Your Name
form.message: Tell us about your project requirements, technologies, and timeline...
form.privacy: By submitting, you agree to our privacy policy. We never share your information.

footer.description: Tria is your software engineering partner to design, build, and scale digital products in Costa Rica and LATAM.
